## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link any related issue: Fixes #123 -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] Backend: `cd backend && go build ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./...` passes
- [ ] Frontend (if touched): `pnpm -C packages/core typecheck` and the relevant build pass
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change where it makes sense
- [ ] Updated docs (`docs/`, `README.md`) and `CHANGELOG.md` if user-facing
- [ ] No secrets, credentials or environment-specific hostnames added

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots. -->
